title: Rebrand application from ClipTube to Beast Clipping

requirements.summary: Update the application header branding in the Layout component to display 'Beast Clipping' instead of 'ClipTube'
acceptanceCriteria: The header text in the Layout component displays 'Beast Clipping'
The branding is visible on all pages of the application

file_operations.description: Update the header text from 'ClipTube' to 'Beast Clipping' in the Layout component branding section

requirements.summary: Update the HTML page title in index.html to 'Beast Clipping' instead of any reference to 'ClipTube'
acceptanceCriteria: The browser tab displays 'Beast Clipping' as the page title

file_operations.description: Update the <title> tag content to 'Beast Clipping' replacing any existing ClipTube references
